input.niche: Specialty home coffee brewing — pour-over, espresso, and manual brewing methods for people who want better coffee at home without becoming baristas
input.audience: Adults 25-45 who drink coffee daily and want to improve their home brewing but are overwhelmed by the hobby's complexity
example_videos: The $20 French Press That Changed My Morning
Why Your Pour-Over Tastes Sour (3 Fixes)
input.already_covered: French press basics, pour-over technique, grinder comparison, cold brew

input.niche: Urban container gardening for apartment dwellers with no outdoor space — vegetables, herbs, and small fruits grown on windowsills and balconies

example_videos: I Grew Tomatoes on My Windowsill for a Year
The 5 Easiest Herbs to Grow Indoors
Small Balcony Garden Tour (15 Plants in 3 Square Meters)

label: European context — European football tactics channel

input.niche: Football (soccer) tactical analysis for fans who want to understand the game at a deeper level — formations, pressing systems, and coaching philosophy in European leagues
input.audience: Football fans aged 20-40 across Europe and globally who watch the Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, and Serie A and want to understand why teams play the way they do
example_videos: Why Guardiola's System Works (And Why It Fails)
The Pressing Trap Explained in 5 Minutes
How Ancelotti Changed Real Madrid's Shape This Season
input.already_covered: Basic formations (4-3-3, 4-2-3-1), pressing fundamentals, Guardiola tactical overview
input.preferred_formats: Tactical breakdown with match footage analysis, comparison, explainer
input.audience_pain_points: Comments frequently ask 'why did the manager make that substitution?' and 'what is a false 9 actually supposed to do?'

input.niche: Personal finance for beginners — budgeting, saving, investing basics
input.audience: Adults 22-35 who are intimidated by finance and have never invested
example_videos: I Saved $10,000 in 6 Months on a $45K Salary
input.already_covered: 50/30/20 rule, emergency fund basics, index fund intro, credit score explainer
input.audience_pain_points: Viewers say every finance channel says the same thing. They want someone who acknowledges that advice like 'just stop buying coffee' is insulting when rent takes 60% of your income.

label: Nigerian creator — local audience with global potential

input.niche: Nigerian street food and market cooking — documenting recipes, vendors, and food culture across Nigerian states
input.audience: Nigerians aged 18-40 who are interested in their own food heritage, plus diaspora viewers who miss home cooking, plus international food enthusiasts discovering Nigerian cuisine

Bole and Fish in Port Harcourt: The Recipe Nobody Writes Down
I Tried Every Jollof Rice Recipe in Lagos Market
input.already_covered: Jollof rice debate, suya profiles, amala spots in Lagos, palm wine tapping
input.preferred_formats: Documentary-style vendor profiles, recipe recreations, regional food tours

label: Channel in decline — needs revival strategy

input.niche: DIY electronics and Arduino projects for hobbyists
input.audience: Tech hobbyists 30-55 who enjoy building physical projects
input.already_covered: Arduino basics, Raspberry Pi intro, 15+ project tutorials, soldering fundamentals
input.audience_pain_points: Views have dropped 60% in the past year. The algorithm seems to have deprioritised the channel. Comments suggest viewers have moved to TikTok for shorter project videos. The creator is considering quitting.
